title: How should you slow down AI progress if it becomes necessary?
summary: How should you slow down AI progress if it becomes necessary?
whyItMatters: Summary and Introduction How should the world slow down AI progress if it ever decides it needs to? If you ever see substantial evidence of catastrophic risk emerging, social instability caused by mass unemployment occurring, or a software intelligence explosion (SIE) beginning that causes progress to outpace our ability to adapt, you could decide that it’s…
